title: SLH-DSA Overview
description: Introduction to SLH-DSA (Stateless Hash-Based Digital Signature Algorithm), the NIST FIPS 205 standard based on SPHINCS+ providing conservative post-quantum signatures.
learningObjectives: Understand SLH-DSA's purpose and design philosophy
Learn how SLH-DSA differs from lattice-based signatures
Identify use cases where SLH-DSA is preferred
Understand the stateless vs stateful distinction
